title: LAM TAWNTUNG A HONG PAIPIH HI

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Lam tawntung a hong pai pih hi
A dang bang ka ngen nawn diam
Hong itna ka muang khial diam
A mah muang leng leitung ah zong
Kei tungah bang bang hong tung zong
Jesuh’n a pha bawl ka thei
Jesuh’n a pha bawl ka thei.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Lam tawn tung a hong pai pih
Hin na anlum in hong vak
kha tui duh dangtak in vul
Ka khe tawl puk dek lai tak
Ka mai ah suangpi pan hong phul
Ka mai ah suangpi pan hong phul

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Tawldamna tak, hong kham zo hi
Sih nawn lohna puan bang silhin
A taang gam ka kai ding hi
Tua ciang sa ning a tawntungin
